login.title: Sign in to your account
login.description: Enter your credentials to access Miks.

errors.emailNotVerified: Please verify your email before logging in.
errors.lockedOut: Account temporarily locked. Try again later.
errors.networkError: Could not reach the server. Check your connection.

twoFactor.title: Two-factor authentication
twoFactor.description: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app.

register.title: Create your account
register.description: Join Miks and digitise your cooperative group

errors.emailTaken: An account with this email already exists.
errors.weakPassword: Password must be strong (uppercase, lowercase, number, symbol).
errors.cguRequired: You must accept the CGU to register.

verifyEmail.title: Check your inbox
verifyEmail.description: We sent a 6-digit code to {email}. Enter it below to verify your account.
verifyEmail.noSessionHelp: Your verification session may have expired or you came here from a direct link.

forgotPassword.title: Reset your password
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email address and we'll send you a reset code.
forgotPassword.sentHint: We sent a reset code to your email address. Click the link in the email or enter the code manually.
forgotPassword.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

resetPassword.title: Choose a new password
resetPassword.description: Enter your email, the code we sent you, and your new password.
resetPassword.descriptionFromLink: Enter the 6-digit code from your email and your new password.
resetPassword.bannerHint: Click the link from the reset email for a smoother experience, or enter the code manually below.
resetPassword.successHelp: You can now sign in with your new password.

errors.generic: Could not reset password. Please try again.
Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.forbidden: You don't have access to this resource.
